title: XO
excerpt: Loving the fact that I have finally found my groove with brush script. Although I am by no means an expert, I am enjoying the process of practice. Lots of practice. As I was finding a rhythm with these xo's,…
body:
Loving the fact that I have finally found my groove with brush script. Although I am by no means an expert, I am enjoying the process of practice. Lots of practice. As I was finding a rhythm with these xo's, I thought this would make for good wrapping paper for my guy for Valentine's Day. I used Mister Huey's in a variety of colors.

Kal Barteski's Life | Scripted is enrolling until tomorrow - January 31st. Class begins on February 1st, although you will have anytime access to the videos (that's how I learned how to do this!) and PDF's forever. Here's a little sneak peek of the project I made.
